title: Carson (Research Version)
description: 3×15min @88-92% FTP with 15s threshold kicks every 5min — TrainerRoad's gold standard sweet spot workout
purpose: Sweet spot with periodic threshold kicks

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/3. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0 minutes of work done. 65 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% for 10:00. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/18. 4:45 at 92%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/18. 88-92% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 92% for 4:45. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/18. 4:45 at 92%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 4:45 at 92%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 14 minutes of threshold work done. Block 1/3. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 4min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 88-95 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/3. 105% for 0:15. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1: 105% for 15s. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. 60 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/18. 4:45 at 92%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 20% complete. Rep 3/18. 92% at 88-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 3/18. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 15 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/18. 92% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 3/18. 92% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 26% complete. Block 1/3. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 15s at 105%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/3. 15s at 105%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/18. 4:45 at 92%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 92% FTP, Seated. 4:45. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/18. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 5/18. 92% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 26% complete. Rep 5/18. 92% for 4:45. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/3. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 12 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1/3. 33% complete. Hold 105% steady. 50 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. 105% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.

coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 92% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 30 minutes of work done. 40 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 92% for 4:45. Then 40min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 40% into session. 92%, 82-90 rpm. Focus and execute.
